title: How do I fix the Local Computer error on SPSS on macOS?
plain_text: Northeastern University offers students and instructors the IBM software SPSS Statistics, a comprehensive set of data and predictive analytics tools. Refer to How do I access SPSS Statistics and Modeler? to access SPSS Statistics. When starting up SPSS, you may encounter the Local Computer error. This article shows how to troubleshoot it. The Local Computer error looks like the following image. Troubleshoot SPSS Startup on macOS Note: Make sure that SPSS is closed before completing the following steps. 1. Navigate to Applications > 'IBM Statistics'. 2. Right-click on 'SPSS Statistics'. 3. Select 'Show Package Contents'. 4. Navigate to Contents > lib. 5. Download the fix file. 6. Move the fix file to Contents > lib. 7. Select Replace. 8. Close all windows and start SPSS again.
body_html:
Northeastern University offers students and instructors the IBM software SPSS Statistics, a comprehensive set of data and predictive analytics tools. Refer to How do I access SPSS Statistics and Modeler? to access SPSS Statistics. When starting up SPSS, you may encounter the Local Computer error. This article shows how to troubleshoot it. The Local Computer error looks like the following image.

Troubleshoot SPSS Startup on macOS

Note: Make sure that SPSS is closed before completing the following steps.

  • Navigate to Applications > 'IBM Statistics'.
  • Right-click on 'SPSS Statistics'.
  • Select 'Show Package Contents'.
  • Navigate to Contents > lib.
  • Download the fix file.
  • Move the fix file to Contents > lib.
  • Select Replace.
  • Close all windows and start SPSS again.
Back to top
